description: Style NoteKitten heel sandals in the season's hottest colour brights - we simply love carlton london's latest summer line! A shoe closet essential, this pair is just right to spice up a pastel dominated look or colour pop a monochrome theme.Heel: 2"Product Details Red sandals with thong straps and three slim forefoot strapsRed and silver footbed with printed branding at the heelSlim kitten heel with a plastic heel capTPU outsole with horizontal grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
